g.text: J1: solder OBD cable wires by pin number. Use SR holes for zip-tie strain relief.

g.desc: J1: solder OBD cable wires by pin number. Use SR holes for zip-tie strain relief.

g.text: SW1 CAN: 1+2=A normal, 3+4=A cross, 5+6=B normal, 7+8=B cross. Never normal+cross together.

g.desc: SW1 CAN: 1+2=A normal, 3+4=A cross, 5+6=B normal, 7+8=B cross. Never normal+cross together.

g.text: SW2 LIN/K: select exactly ONE source. LIN/K is single-wire; no polarity reversal.

g.desc: SW2 LIN/K: select exactly ONE source. LIN/K is single-wire; no polarity reversal.

g.text: Teensy pins audited vs PJRC: CAN1=22/23, CAN2=1/0, LIN UART=8/7.

g.desc: Teensy pins audited vs PJRC: CAN1=22/23, CAN2=1/0, LIN UART=8/7.
